name: Priya Sharma
text: Excellent teaching and real projects helped me get my first job. Anshul sir was incredibly helpful.

name: Ravi Kumar
text: The MERN stack course was very practical. Building clone projects made my portfolio stand out.

name: Ananya Joshi
text: Loved the hands-on sessions with Facebook Ads and Google Analytics. Highly recommended!

name: Mohammed Ali
text: Learned so much about generative AI. It completely changed how I automate tasks at work.

name: Simran Kaur
text: The placement assistance provided was top-notch. They helped me with resume building and mock interviews.

name: Rohan D'Souza
text: The Premiere Pro lessons were amazing. I'm now a freelancer for multiple YouTube channels.

name: Kirti Patel
text: Great environment and very supportive trainers. I had zero coding knowledge before joining.

name: Aditya Verma
text: Rohan sir is an SEO genius. Thanks to his training, my blog now gets organic traffic.

name: Sanya Malhotra
text: The design principles taught here are industry standard. I loved the Figma Masterclass.

name: Devansh Tiwari
text: Intensive coursework but totally worth it. The pro module projects were very close to real industry problems.
